title: Gastropod Galore
description: This mod aims to add Snails and Slugs into Minecraft with unique functions and abilities
body:
This Mod aims to add Useful Snails and Slugs with unique functions and abilities.
1.0 is mostly focused on farming. AND YES. Theres an Immortal Snail
[CurseForge Link](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gastropod-galore)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/15pCT5bTW3I" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## 🐌 New Mobs 🐌
**Snails:**

- Eat crops; can be bred with crop items (wheat, beetroot, potato, carrot) and can be tamed with bonemeal
- Harvest crops when tamed but the owner needs to be holding a hoe with Cultivation
- 10% chance to drop slimeballs when harvesting
- 1/3 Chance to drop Snail Shells when killed, or guaranteed when growing up from baby to adult (similar to turtle scutes)
- 20% to spawn a Snailet (Baby Snail) when it eats a crop
- Can be captured and contained using Terrariums
- Naming a snail “Tanky” turns it green with a purple shell
- Naming a snail “Bob” turns it dark green with a dark red shell
- Naming a snail “Gary” turns it light blue with a pink shell

**Slugs & Banana Slugs:**

- Eat grass, mushrooms, and leaf litter
- Tamed using bonemeal
- 20% to spawn a Sluglet (Baby Slug) when it eats Grass-related Blocks
- Destroys or Eats Grass-related Blocks
- 5% chance to drop slimeballs when eating
- Can be captured and contained using Terrariums

**Painted Snails:**

- Spawns in Jungles and Temperate Rainforest
- When fed flowers, drops 2–4 dyes (or 4–8 for tall flowers)

**Mossy Snail:**

- Spawns in Temperate Rainforest
- Moss-covered shells, Identical to Snails
- Drops Mossy Snail Shells instead of Snail Shells

**Apple Snails:**

- Aquatic crop-eaters (seagrass, kelp)
- Can drop Apple Snail Shells, either by killing or growing up (similar to turtle scutes)
- 25% to spawn a Apple Snailet (Baby Apple Snail) when it eats kelp or seagrass

**Sea Bunnies:**

- Grant Water Breathing to nearby players
- Poison attackers as defense
- Spawn on warm/lukewarm seafloors

**Magma Snails:**

- Speed up on magma, fire, lava, and Nether terrain
- Smelt items (raw foods, ores, clay)
- Smelting cooldown: 100 ticks normally, 50 ticks on hot or warm blocks
- Heats the ground only when provoked
- Shoots Fireballs
- Spawn in Thermal Geodes

**Volcanic Snails:**

- Hostile Nether predator
- Always heats the ground around it
- Shoots Fireballs
- Drops Volcanic Snail Shell

**Immortal Snail:**

- Summoned by right-clicking a Snail with a Totem of Undying, Grants the player valuable resources
- Hunts the player
- It will always stay within 30–35 blocks of the player
- Teleports if farther away
- Feeding an Enchanted Golden Apple makes it mortal for 60 seconds, Duration stacks
- Kills Players even Creative Mode, and Spectator Mode
- If Difficulty ≠ Hard:
Killing it ends it permanently:
Advancement: “You… Killed It…
- If Difficulty = Hard:
Killing it only stuns it for 5 seconds,
The snail revives every time
Advancement: “I Always Come Back”

## 🌲 Biomes 🌲
**Temperate Rainforest:**
- Vanilla mobs: Frogs, Wolves
- New mobs: Snails, Slugs, Banana Slugs, Painted Snails, Mossy Snails

## ✨ Enchantments ✨

**Cultivation** (Hoe)
- Max Lvl: 4
- Plants crops around you in patterns (Plus, 3x3 Square, Diamond, 5×5 Square)
- Lvl 3+ expands hoe-till radius to 3×3

**Zeal** (Hoe)
- Max Lvl: 2
- Speeds up tamed Snails/Slugs
- Lvl 2 removes harvest cooldown entirely

## 📦 Blocks: 📦
**Snail Shell:**
- Dropped by Snails
- Can be laid down when crouching
- Craft into 3 Bonemeal
- Brew into Potion of Sluggishness
- Slowness II + Resistance II (1 minute)
- Trade 5 shells → 1 emerald (Farmer)
- Wandering traders: 1 emerald → 3 shells
- When Bonemealed, Bonemeals the blocks around it

**Volcanic Snail Shell:**
- Dropped by Volcanic Snails

**Mossy Snail Shell:**
- Dropped by Mossy Snails
- Can be laid down when crouching

**Apple Snail Shell:**
- Dropped by Apple Snails
- Can be laid down when crouching
- Craft into 3 Bonemeal

**Terrarium:**
- Can be used to Capture Snails and Slugs (doesn't save Owner so it doesn't tame when released, same with names)
- Crafted with 5 Glass, 3 Wood Slabs, and a Grass Block

**Snail in a Terrarium:**
- Contains a Snail in a Terrarium
- Can release the contained Snail by crouching then right-clicking

**Slug in a Terrarium:**
- Contains a Slug in a Terrarium
- Can release the contained Slug by crouching then right-clicking

**Banana Slug in a Terrarium:**
- Contains a Banana Slug in a Terrarium
- Can release the contained Banana Slug by crouching then right-clicking
 
## 🎒 Items: 🎒
Roasted Carrots:
- Cooked carrots
- Food item equivalent to baked potatoes

## ~~📦 Cut/Scrapped/Shelved Features: NOT PERMNANTLY REMOVED 📦~~

- ~~Haunt - Ghost Snail that would protect farmland.~~
- ~~Harmony - Tames nearby Snails or Slugs if holding its food item~~
- ~~Slug Mucus - No Uses~~
 

## 🔧 Planned Features/Updates: 🔧
 

- Volcanic Snail Shell Chestplate - Slightly weaker than Netherite, gives Fire Resistance for 15 seconds or longer (based on Turtle Helmets)
- More Structures - Snail Dens, Abandoned Huts, etc.
- More Terrariums for other Gastropods
- Aquariums - Terrariums for Sea/Freshwater Gastropods
- More Sea/Freshwater-related Gastropods
- More Nether-related Gastropods
